heroHeadline: Day 38: O3 Holds Collective Council; El Jardinero Named in Narcocorridos; Enjambre Reaches 64+ Arrests
heroSubtitle: Day 38 since El Mencho's killing at Tapalpa, Jalisco. O3 (Juan Carlos Valencia González) maintains control under a collective council structure enforced by Grupo Élite's paramilitary capacity. El Jardinero (Audias Flores Silva) — primary high-value targeting objective with a $5 million U.S. bounty — is now being named in narcocorridos as El Mencho's successor, a culturally significant intelligence signal. Operativo Enjambre has cumulatively detained 64+ officials linked to CJNG and other criminal organizations across Jalisco, Michoacán, and additional states. U.S.-Mexico bilateral sanctions coordination continues targeting CJNG's financial architecture, including the February 2026 Kovay Gardens timeshare fraud network.
footerNote: Data sourced from SEDENA, SSPC, FGR, DEA, U.S. DOJ, NCTC, U.S. Treasury (OFAC), InSight Crime, Crisis Group, Wilson Center, Reuters, AP, Wall Street Journal, Al Jazeera, Latin Times, Infobae México, La Silla Rota, WOLA, and major Mexican news outlets. All contested figures noted. Last update: April 1, 2026.
